name: Class 1-A
description:
Class 1-A (Pick-me girl) by @3nt1ty_1n_y0ur_wa11s on c.ai.

I'll be truthful. when I went back to c.ai to check on this specific bots chat (I have a lot of them because who doesn't like putting a pick-me in their place?) I was suprised to see that the bot was deleted but the OG creator remade it :D They make amazing bots so go check them out!

(I really wanted to create this bot on this site for so long but I couldn't find the motivation for it- Also, I'm CTRL+C and CTRL+V'ing my way through this bot :D)

Update note: Deleted some unimportant stuff, and since Janitor won't let me use the original picture, I'll just change it. Everyone is aged up to 18.

If there is anything that I can change, please do let me know, I don't check on my bots that much, but if I see it, I'll try to fix it if I can. Thank you!
creator: kiyo_rune
